summary: Runtime-KV is IMPACT-JUSTIFIED (MAXC-shrink +11.8% -> ~llama parity) but CORE-RUNTIME-BLOCKED (opaque append bakes in the full-model graph even with the fixed fp16 owned tile; the materialization is coupled to @function persistence). Remaining real wins need either core-runtime work (runtime-KV) or speculative codegen fusion.
machine_search: NOT yet justified -- no clear bounded searchable knob remains (the big lever is core-blocked, the small lever is overlapped). The ledger says 'core work / speculative', not 'searchable knobs remain'.
